{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Caverns of Flame
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Caverns of Flame]] is a location reached via a [[Naraka]] waypoint.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
